rootCause: The reviewed Codex CLI accepts the approval policy as a global option, but the frozen runner placed it after the exec subcommand.
observedFailure: Codex exited with code 2 before session creation because -a was not accepted in the exec option position.
correctiveBoundary: Move the unchanged -a never option before exec, add an exact argument-order regression test, publish a new runner commit, and freeze a superseding execution binding before retrying.
